data.content: Approved in implementation_review. Reviewed commit ba720779 in /Users/cartine/foolery-c4cc. The change is limited to display label formatting in src/lib/beat-display.ts, where dotted aliases now strip only the project prefix before display, so knots-562b.1 renders as 562b.1 while human-friendly aliases remain unchanged. Added unit coverage in src/lib/__tests__/beat-display.test.ts for hierarchical aliases, multi-dot aliases, and unchanged friendly aliases. Verification rerun in the implementation worktree: bun run lint completed with existing warnings only and no errors; bunx tsc --noEmit passed; bun run test passed (150 files, 2094 tests); bun run build passed. No invariants were defined for this knot, and I found no security or regression concerns within the reviewed scope.
